body.digest_value_normalization: a value is present only if it is a string whose strip() is non-empty; the normalized value is strip()

provider_client_digest_reference.candidate_filter: same permit id and event_type in accepted set
provider_client_digest_reference.permit_id_resolution: candidate payload.permit_id non-empty string else record_permit_id from flattened export context
provider_client_digest_reference.success_rule: closure digest normalized value must be one of the normalized present candidate payload values for the same field

dispatch_digest_reference.record_digest_source: flattened export context record_binding_request_hash, derived from records[].permit.binding_request_hash or bundle-level chain entry permit id lookup
dispatch_digest_reference.success_rule: normalized closure dispatch_request_digest_v1 equals normalized record_binding_request_hash
